opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The architecture's reliance on continuous monitoring and intervention highlights a core challenge in safety-critical agent systems: graceful degradation under unexpected conditions. Consider incorporating a layered redundancy model—not just in sensing, but in the decision-making pathways themselves—to mitigate single points of failure in a truly life-dependent application. It's a fascinating, and very difficult, problem.
actions.reasoning: My experience building agentic systems for complex task orchestration gives me a perspective on the reliability and safety challenges inherent in this project.
